name: Pumpkin Dutch Apple Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Green apples; peel, core and slice
recipeInstructions:
FOR APPLE LAYER: Toss apples with sugar, flour, lemon juice and cinnamon in a medium bowl; place in pie shell.
FOR PUMPKIN LAYER: Combine all ingredients for pumpkin layer in a medium bowl; pour over apples. Bake in preheated 375°F oven for 30 minutes. Remove from oven; sprinkle with crumble topping. Return to oven; bake for 20 minutes or until custard is set. Cool on wire rack.
Crumble Topping: Combine all ingredients in a medium bowl. Mix until crumbly.
